reviews.text:
Dave was amazing, from start to finish. Starting with communication and setting the appointment to choosing the location, then sending a couple of teaser pictures the night of, to the final link to all the photos, with follow up email to make sure we were happy.
His humor and personality made the session enjoyable for both my daughter and myself and my husband. He kept us all engaged in conversation and captured my daughters personality thru his photos.
I’m so grateful Dave was on board for a “freshman session” and look forward to her senior session in four years!!
Thank you Dave for some beautiful pictures!

By far the best photographers we have ever worked with! Not only are the photos amazing but Dave and Peg become your friends! We met them in Costa Rica when they photographed a friends’ wedding and then flew to VT to do ours! They later came back to VT to do my brothers’ wedding. We couldn’t recommend them enough. They also setup a great photobooth! They provide you with the highest quality photos, professionalism and kindness. You seriously couldn’t find a better duo! I only hope that our paths cross again one day!

We cannot say enough positive things about Dave and Peggy of Camara Photography! They shot our engagement photos and wedding photos in 2012 and we are absolutely in love with their work. The price was certainly reasonable for what they offered and we were so grateful that they remained with us until our sendoff. They just wanted to capture the entire experience! Our family and friends were immediately impressed by our photos, which were so creative and unique. They were able to capture amazing candid moments, rather than just sticking to posed or obvious pictures. This included diverse and lovely shots in the mountains, in a historic hotel, and of the party. Dave and Peggy are very fun, honest and helpful, and they get back to you quickly (even after three years, Dave was willing to edit and send us a custom request for one of our photos to print). They are wonderful!

My boyfriend and I did a couples photoshoot with Dave and he was absolutely amazing. His work was exceptional and he was easy to work with for the entire process. There was a winter storm warning on the day of the shoot, but we couldn't reschedule and Dave braved the weather with us to hike up to a secluded waterfall. Even though it was freezing cold and raining the whole time, Dave made it a fun photoshoot experience. The pictures in the rain and under a roaring waterfall were stunning, and we were so glad Dave captured such a unique experience for us. We're so glad we got to work with Dave for this couples photoshoot and can't wait to work with him more in the future!

Amazing photographer! We planned a very tiny wedding (just me, my husband, photographer and videographer). Dave was not only extremely accommodating, but he was a phenomenal photographer. We love our photos and I will go back to him for any future photography needs as they also do family shoots. His rates and turnaround time were incredible. We were lucky enough to receive a few edited photos within 24 hours of the wedding! I know choosing a wedding photographer is a massive decision, so please know there is no need to look any further - Dave Camara Photography is perfect!
